perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a Costco warehouse aisle, holding several different colored Snoopy-themed blankets (Blue, Green, White, and Yellow). A large Costco Wholesale logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) A close-up shot transitions to show the yellow blankets stacked high on warehouse shelving units. (3) The camera returns to the two women as they hold up the blue and green blankets specifically, gesturing to the patterns and talking with animated facial expressions. (4) One woman holds a green blanket while the other holds a yellow one, showcasing the individual designs. (5) They both hold multiple blankets again, looking directly at the camera with smiles and encouraging gestures.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop music starts and continues throughout the video. A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin, announcing that the Snoopy blankets are back in stock. (2) The voice continues listing colors: yellow, white, green, and blue. Background warehouse ambient noise is very low. (3) The speaker's tone remains enthusiastic as she highlights the green and blue versions as rare finds. (4) The vocal speed remains fast as she mentions the price and gives a call to action to buy quickly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Standard Mandarin subtitles appear at the bottom center of the screen, providing a literal transcription of the dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. Bold, variety-show style captions appear in the center: '終於補貨了' (Finally back in stock), '賣到缺貨的史努比毯毯' (The sold-out Snoopy blankets), '四色都有' (All four colors available), '推薦綠色' (Recommend green), and '非常推薦入手' (Highly recommended to buy). The tone is urgent and promotional.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators/presenters in the foreground
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women. One has long dark hair and wears a brown jacket over a white patterned skirt. The other wears a white bucket hat and a white knee-length dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse retail environment with high ceilings, industrial shelving units, and bulk products stacked in boxes.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and inventory update for Costco members. It aims to inform viewers that a popular, previously sold-out item (Snoopy blankets) is back in stock in multiple colors, leveraging the scarcity of certain colors to encourage immediate purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are specifically showcasing products from a brand (Peanuts/Snoopy) at a specific retailer (Costco) with a clear recommendation to buy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show text overlays with vibrant colors.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical 'Haul' or 'New In' style content popularized by social media shopping influencers.
